series_metadata.series_title: SFM Forensic Lab Quality Assurance Files
series_metadata.series_description: Records consist of quality assurance records relating to the State Fire Marshal Forensic Laboratory’s Ansi National Accreditation Board (ANAB) program requirements including but not limited to, reports from internal audits, management reviews, records of corrective actions, records of preventative actions, proficiency tests, courtroom testimony reviews, etc.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: one ANAB cycle of accreditation or four years, whichever is longer ; Electronic: one ANAB cycle of accreditation or four years, whichever is longer, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
